info.title: AI Tutor API
info.description:
AI-powered learning platform backend API.

**Modules:** Auth, Organizations, Academic Structure, Materials, Lessons, Flashcards, Quizzes, Chat (RAG), Progress, Analytics, Search, Notifications, Usage, Jobs

**Response format:** `{ success, message, data }`

tags.name: Academic
tags.description: Academic year, term, subject, and topic hierarchy

tags.name: Materials
tags.description: Material upload and AI processing pipeline

tags.name: Progress
tags.description: Student progress tracking and spaced repetition

200.description: Reset email sent if account exists

post.description: Sends an invitation email with a token link. Requires SCHOOL_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Public endpoint. Creates account if new user, or links existing account.

get.summary: List terms for an academic year

post.description: Uploads PDF to Cloudflare R2 and queues async AI processing (extract → chunk → embed → Qdrant index).

503.description: R2 storage or Redis queue unavailable

post.summary: Add a YouTube video as material
post.description: Fetches video transcript in background and queues AI processing.

get.description: Returns metadata including processingStatus, summary, and chunkCount.

delete.description: Soft-deletes material, removes R2 file and Qdrant vectors.

patch.description: Sets material status to INACTIVE without deleting vectors.

get.description: Returns stage-by-stage processing history (UPLOADED → CHUNKING → EMBEDDING → etc.).

post.description: Teacher selects 1–10 processed materials from a topic. AI synthesizes a lesson, then auto-queues flashcards and quiz.

get.summary: Get quiz metadata for a lesson
Get quiz questions for a lesson

post.description: Scope chat by providing only the IDs you need. Invalid or placeholder values are ignored. contextType is inferred from the most specific ID provided.

contextType.description: Optional. Inferred from scope IDs when omitted.

get.summary: Get chat session with message history

post.description: Retrieves relevant chunks from Qdrant, injects into AI prompt, returns grounded answer with sources.
Records review and updates spaced repetition schedule (SM-2 inspired).

get.description: Returns flashcards whose nextReviewAt is in the past, ordered by urgency.
Class performance, difficult lessons, struggling students.
Active students, materials, AI usage, lesson completion. Requires SCHOOL_ADMIN.
Monthly token/request usage vs plan limits. Requires SCHOOL_ADMIN.

get.summary: List failed jobs in a queue
List source materials for a lesson
Lesson detail with flashcards and quiz

role.description: Self-registration only allows STUDENT. Staff require invite.

processingStage.description: Detailed pipeline stage for processing tracking
